description_long: This copy shop or print shop is a modern, boxy commercial building with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The facade features a large glass window section on the lower level, likely serving as the main storefront, with a door adjacent to it. The upper portion of the building is mostly solid, with minimal ornamentation and a muted color palette dominated by gray and greenish tones. The rooftop is bordered by a low parapet and contains several colored rectangular elements, possibly representing rooftop equipment or skylights. The overall design is utilitarian, with an emphasis on function and accessibility, typical of urban commercial architecture. No visible signage, posters, or window displays are present, giving the shop a minimalist and contemporary appearance.
description: A modern, boxy copy shop with a large glass storefront, flat roof, and minimal exterior detailing in gray and green tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large glass window section and a door, with green panels above and a flat roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid gray facade with minimal detailing and a glimpse of the rooftop elements.
description_view_2: Rear view with a mostly solid gray wall and visible rooftop features, lacking windows or doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a plain gray wall and the flat roof with colored rooftop elements.
attribute_architectural_style: modern; characterized by a flat roof, large glass storefront, clean lines, and minimal exterior ornamentation.
